vision: Enterprise data integration platform for creating synchronization workflows between business applications

target_audience.primary: Enterprise integration developers and IT professionals who need to create automated data synchronization workflows between business applications (CRM, ERP, financial systems)
secondary: Business analysts configuring data integrations without deep coding
System administrators managing integration flows and schedules
Small-to-medium business owners needing to connect Salesforce with QuickBooks or payment processors

phases.name: Foundation & Security
phases.description: Address critical security concerns, fix authentication issues, and stabilize the platform for production use. This phase eliminates technical debt blocking enterprise adoption.

milestones.title: Production-Ready Authentication
milestones.description: Custom user accounts work reliably without workarounds, enabling secure multi-tenant deployments

milestones.title: Enterprise-Ready Documentation
milestones.description: Comprehensive documentation enables self-service onboarding for new customers

phases.name: Competitive Differentiation
phases.description: Strengthen core differentiators against MuleSoft, Zapier, and other competitors. Focus on pricing, deployment flexibility, and deep integrations that competitors lack.

milestones.title: Modern API Platform
milestones.description: REST API enables programmatic access and third-party integrations

milestones.title: Visual Experience Upgrade
milestones.description: Modernized web portal and enhanced visual XSLT editor compete with contemporary tools

milestones.title: Enterprise Scalability
milestones.description: Multi-user support and robust error handling enable team-based deployments

phases.name: Market Expansion
phases.description: Expand market reach by addressing regulated industry needs, enhancing monitoring, and building template ecosystem. Target the mid-market gap between Zapier and MuleSoft.

milestones.title: Compliance & Governance
milestones.description: Platform meets data sovereignty requirements for regulated industries (healthcare, finance)

milestones.title: Template Ecosystem
milestones.description: Pre-built integration templates reduce time-to-value for common business scenarios

phases.name: Innovation & Future
phases.description: Long-term innovations including AI-assisted mapping, no-code capabilities, and platform modernization. Position for next-generation enterprise integration needs.

milestones.title: AI-Powered Integration
milestones.description: AI assists with field mapping and transformation suggestions, reducing expertise barrier

milestones.title: Platform Modernization
milestones.description: Updated technology stack ensures long-term viability and developer experience

features.title: Fix Custom User Authentication
features.description: Resolve the authentication issues preventing custom user accounts from working. Replace or decompile the proprietary LoginServlet to enable standard user creation and authentication without requiring admin bypass workarounds.
features.rationale: This is a critical blocker for production deployments. Custom user accounts are essential for enterprise multi-tenant usage. Currently only admin accounts work, which is a security and usability concern that competitors don't have.
acceptance_criteria: New user accounts can be created through the web portal
Users can log in with their own credentials without admin bypass
User permissions and access controls work as designed
Authentication works with both local and Oracle Cloud database configurations
user_stories: As a system administrator, I want to create individual user accounts so that team members have personalized access with proper audit trails
As an IT manager, I want to control user permissions so that sensitive integration configurations are protected

features.title: Security Hardening - Remove Hardcoded Credentials
features.description: Eliminate hardcoded admin credentials from application bytecode. Implement secure credential management using environment variables, encrypted configuration files, or secure vault integration.
features.rationale: Hardcoded credentials are a critical security vulnerability that would fail enterprise security audits. This directly addresses the technical debt concern and is essential for any production deployment in security-conscious organizations.
acceptance_criteria: No credentials are stored in compiled bytecode or source files
Admin credentials can be configured externally via environment variables or config files
Credentials are encrypted at rest
Security scan passes without credential exposure warnings
user_stories: As a security officer, I want credentials managed securely so that the application passes our security audit
As a DevOps engineer, I want to configure credentials through environment variables so that deployment automation is secure

features.title: Comprehensive Documentation Overhaul
features.description: Create thorough, well-organized documentation including installation guides, user manuals, XSLT transformation tutorials, API references, and troubleshooting guides. Include video tutorials for visual learners.
features.rationale: Documentation is a known gap that impacts onboarding. Competitors like MuleSoft have steep learning curves (pain-1-2), but good documentation can help IW_IDE differentiate as a more accessible platform.
acceptance_criteria: Installation guide enables self-service setup without support calls
All existing features are documented with examples
XSLT transformation tutorial with common patterns
Troubleshooting guide covers top 10 support issues
Documentation is searchable and indexed
user_stories: As a new user, I want clear documentation so that I can get started without extensive training
As an integration developer, I want XSLT examples so that I can create transformations without deep XML expertise

features.title: Quick-Start Integration Templates
features.description: Create pre-configured, ready-to-deploy templates for the most common integration scenarios: Salesforce-to-QuickBooks (AR/AP), Salesforce-to-Authorize.Net, and Creatio-to-Stripe. Templates should require minimal configuration to go live.
features.rationale: Competitors are 'overbuilt for simple integrations' (pain-1-4, pain-2-3). Purpose-built templates address the market gap for turnkey Salesforce/QuickBooks integration. This is a major differentiator that directly addresses the competitor pain points identified.
acceptance_criteria: Salesforce-to-QuickBooks template deploys in under 30 minutes
Templates include field mapping for common objects
Setup wizard guides users through configuration
Each template has accompanying video walkthrough
user_stories: As a small business owner, I want a turnkey Salesforce-to-QuickBooks integration so that I don't need to hire developers
As a system administrator, I want pre-built templates so that common integrations don't require custom development

features.title: Modern REST API for Programmatic Access
features.description: Create a comprehensive REST API that allows external systems to trigger flows, monitor status, retrieve logs, and manage configurations programmatically. Include OpenAPI/Swagger documentation.
features.rationale: This is a known gap in the current state. A REST API enables automation, CI/CD integration, and third-party tool connectivity. It modernizes the platform and supports enterprise DevOps practices.
acceptance_criteria: API supports CRUD operations for flows, schedules, and configurations
API can trigger flow execution and retrieve status
OpenAPI specification is published and interactive
API authentication uses industry-standard tokens (JWT/OAuth2)
Rate limiting and security controls are in place
user_stories: As a DevOps engineer, I want to trigger integrations via API so that I can automate deployment pipelines
As an integration developer, I want to programmatically manage flows so that I can version control configurations

features.title: Web Portal UI Modernization
features.description: Redesign the JSP-based web portal with a modern, responsive interface using contemporary web technologies. Improve navigation, add dashboard analytics, and enhance mobile responsiveness.
features.rationale: The current JSP-based UI is a known technical debt item. A modern UI improves user experience and positions IW_IDE competitively against sleek interfaces from Zapier and Power Automate, while being more accessible than complex MuleSoft.
acceptance_criteria: New UI is responsive and works on mobile devices
Dashboard shows integration status at a glance
Navigation is intuitive with no more than 3 clicks to any feature
Performance is faster than current JSP pages
Maintains backward compatibility with existing functionality
user_stories: As a system administrator, I want a modern dashboard so that I can monitor integrations at a glance
As a business analyst, I want an intuitive interface so that I can configure integrations without developer help

features.title: Enhanced Visual XSLT Editor with Drag-and-Drop Mapping
features.description: Upgrade the visual XSLT editor to support drag-and-drop field mapping between source and target schemas. Add real-time transformation preview, syntax highlighting, and error detection.
features.rationale: Addresses the market gap (gap-4) for visual IDE with complex data transformations. Zapier struggles with complex mapping (pain-3-2), and XSLT knowledge is a constraint. Visual mapping reduces the expertise barrier while leveraging XSLT power.
acceptance_criteria: Users can drag fields from source schema to target schema
Mapping automatically generates XSLT code
Real-time preview shows transformation output
Common transformation functions available via dropdown
Syntax errors are highlighted before save
user_stories: As an integration developer, I want to drag-and-drop field mappings so that I can create transformations faster
As a business analyst, I want visual mapping so that I can configure integrations without learning XSLT syntax

features.title: Enhanced Multi-User Support with Role-Based Access Control
features.description: Implement comprehensive multi-user support with role-based access control (RBAC), team workspaces, and audit logging. Enable concurrent users with proper isolation and collaboration features.
features.rationale: Multi-user support is a known gap that limits team-based usage. Enterprise customers need role-based access for security compliance and team collaboration on integration projects.
acceptance_criteria: Support for at least 20 concurrent users
Roles: Admin, Developer, Operator, Viewer with distinct permissions
Audit log tracks all user actions with timestamps
Team workspaces isolate projects between groups
Single sign-on (SSO) support via SAML/OIDC
user_stories: As an IT manager, I want role-based access so that users only see integrations they're authorized for
As a compliance officer, I want audit logs so that I can track who made what changes and when

features.title: Robust Error Handling and Retry Logic
features.description: Implement configurable error handling with automatic retry, exponential backoff, dead letter queues, and error notifications. Add comprehensive error reporting and recovery workflows.
features.rationale: Zapier has 'limited error handling and retry logic' (pain-3-5) which is weak for mission-critical workflows. Robust error handling is essential for enterprise reliability and differentiates IW_IDE from simpler tools.
acceptance_criteria: Configurable retry attempts with exponential backoff
Failed transactions queued for manual review
Email/webhook notifications on critical failures
Error dashboard shows failure trends and patterns
One-click retry for failed transactions
user_stories: As an operations manager, I want automatic retries so that transient failures don't require manual intervention
As a system administrator, I want error notifications so that I'm alerted to problems before customers complain

features.title: Compliance Documentation for Regulated Industries
features.description: Create compliance documentation, security whitepapers, and deployment guides for regulated industries (HIPAA for healthcare, SOC 2, PCI-DSS for payments, GDPR for EU). Include audit checklists and configuration recommendations.
features.rationale: Addresses market gap (gap-6) for organizations with data sovereignty requirements. Cloud-only competitors can't meet compliance needs for on-premise data processing. This documentation enables sales to regulated industries.
acceptance_criteria: HIPAA deployment guide with BAA template
SOC 2 control mapping document
PCI-DSS compliance checklist for payment integrations
GDPR data processing guide for EU deployments
Security whitepaper suitable for procurement review
user_stories: As a healthcare IT director, I want HIPAA compliance documentation so that I can justify using IW_IDE for patient data integrations
As a security auditor, I want SOC 2 control mapping so that I can evaluate the platform against our requirements

features.title: Real-Time Monitoring Dashboard with Alerts
features.description: Create a comprehensive monitoring dashboard showing real-time integration status, transaction volumes, error rates, and performance metrics. Include configurable alerts for anomalies and SLA violations.
features.rationale: Enterprises need visibility into integration health. Real-time monitoring enables proactive issue detection and supports SLA management. This is expected in enterprise platforms.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard updates in real-time (< 5 second refresh)
Shows transaction volume, success rate, and latency metrics
Configurable alert thresholds via web UI
Historical charts for trend analysis
Integration with external monitoring tools (webhooks, email)
user_stories: As an operations manager, I want real-time visibility so that I can detect problems before they impact business
As a system administrator, I want alerting so that I'm notified of issues during off-hours

features.title: Integration Template Marketplace
features.description: Create a marketplace where users can discover, share, and download integration templates. Include community ratings, verified publisher program, and one-click deployment for templates.
features.rationale: Templates address the market gap (gap-2) for turnkey integrations. A marketplace builds community, reduces implementation time, and creates network effects. Competitors like Workato have recipe marketplaces as a strength.
acceptance_criteria: Templates are discoverable by category and keyword search
One-click deployment from marketplace to user environment
Rating and review system for community feedback
Verified publisher badges for official/partner templates
Template versioning and update notifications
user_stories: As an integration developer, I want to share my templates so that others can benefit from my work
As a business user, I want to find proven templates so that I don't have to start from scratch

features.title: Unlimited Transaction Pricing Marketing Package
features.description: Create marketing materials, pricing calculator, and ROI documentation that clearly communicate the one-time license with unlimited transactions value proposition. Include competitor comparison charts.
features.rationale: Directly addresses the top pain point across competitors: high subscription costs and per-task pricing that scales poorly (pain-1-1, pain-2-1, pain-3-1, pain-5-1). This is IW_IDE's key differentiator.
acceptance_criteria: ROI calculator shows cost savings vs subscription competitors
Comparison chart against MuleSoft, Zapier, Boomi pricing
Case study with real customer cost savings
Sales battlecard for competitive situations
Landing page optimized for 'affordable integration platform' keywords
user_stories: As a CFO, I want clear cost comparison so that I can justify the investment to my board
As a buyer evaluating options, I want TCO analysis so that I can compare IW_IDE to subscription alternatives

features.title: AI-Assisted Field Mapping Suggestions
features.description: Use AI/ML to automatically suggest field mappings between source and target schemas based on field names, data types, and common patterns. Reduce manual mapping effort for new integrations.
features.rationale: Reduces the expertise barrier for creating complex mappings. AI assistance helps business analysts create integrations without deep technical knowledge, addressing the goal of reducing development time.
acceptance_criteria: AI suggests mappings with >80% accuracy for standard objects
Suggestions include confidence scores
Users can accept, modify, or reject suggestions
System learns from user corrections over time
Works offline without cloud AI dependencies
user_stories: As a business analyst, I want AI-suggested mappings so that I can create integrations without extensive training
As an integration developer, I want automatic mapping so that I can focus on complex transformations instead of routine mappings

features.title: No-Code Connector Builder
features.description: Create a visual no-code interface for building custom API connectors. Users can define REST/SOAP endpoints, authentication, request/response mappings without writing code.
features.rationale: Extends platform to connect with any application, not just pre-built integrations. Addresses goal of creating reusable integration templates and reduces dependency on development team for new connectors.
acceptance_criteria: Visual interface for defining API endpoints
Support for common authentication methods (API key, OAuth, Basic)
Test connectivity within the builder
Generated connectors work in flow designer
Export/import connectors for sharing
user_stories: As an integration developer, I want to build custom connectors visually so that I can integrate new applications quickly
As a system administrator, I want to connect to internal APIs so that I can include custom applications in workflows

features.title: Java Runtime Upgrade Path
features.description: Plan and execute upgrade from JRE 8 to a supported LTS Java version (Java 17 or 21). Update dependencies, test compatibility, and create migration documentation for existing deployments.
features.rationale: Java 8 is outdated and may have security and compatibility issues (known technical debt). Modern Java provides performance improvements, new features, and long-term support. Essential for platform longevity.
acceptance_criteria: All features work on Java 17 or 21 LTS
Performance benchmarks show improvement or parity
Migration guide for existing deployments
Backward compatibility maintained for user configurations
Security scan passes with updated runtime
user_stories: As a security officer, I want current Java version so that known vulnerabilities are patched
As a system administrator, I want modern Java so that I can use current OS versions without compatibility issues

features.title: Webhook Support for Real-Time Event Triggers
features.description: Add webhook endpoints that can trigger integration flows in real-time based on external events. Support for incoming webhooks (receive events) and outgoing webhooks (send notifications).
features.rationale: Real-time triggers complement scheduled integrations. Many modern applications communicate via webhooks. This enables event-driven architectures and reduces integration latency.
acceptance_criteria: Configurable webhook endpoints with unique URLs
Support for common payload formats (JSON, form-encoded)
Webhook authentication (HMAC signature verification)
Automatic flow triggering on webhook receipt
Outgoing webhooks for integration notifications
user_stories: As an integration developer, I want webhook triggers so that integrations run immediately when events occur
As a system administrator, I want webhook notifications so that other systems are updated in real-time

metadata.analysis_notes: Roadmap leverages competitor analysis from 5 major competitors (MuleSoft, Dell Boomi, Zapier, Power Automate, Workato). Key differentiators identified: one-time pricing vs subscriptions, on-premise deployment capability, deep Salesforce/QuickBooks integration, and XSLT-based transformations.
